name: zer0-skill-pack
description: Polymarket intelligence skills for Aeon. Daily theses, mispricing scanners, contrarian fades, narrative-vs-market gaps, paper-trade PnL journal, and alpha comment curation.
author: ZER0 LABS (@shakaliyvadev)

skills.description: Settle resolved Polymarket positions and compute running PnL on tracked paper-trade positions.
Daily take on three top Polymarket markets with side, price, conviction X/10, and reasoning.
Hunt for Polymarket mispricings where the price diverges from what the news baseline justifies.
High-conviction fades against heavy Polymarket favorites (>0.80) where a real tail scenario exists.
Compare X discourse to Polymarket odds on the same topic and flag the biggest narrative-vs-market gaps.
Curate whale callouts, insider-sounding takes, contrarian reasoning, and resolution alpha from Polymarket comment streams.
